Short CV

Burcu Dündar Ertemiz, born in 1981, has graduated from Marmara University Health Education Faculty, Healthcare Management in 2002. After her graduation, she worked in various private hospitals' patient relations and quality departments. In 2007 she received her MSc degree in Management and Organisation from Marmara University and in 2010 she graduated from Anadolu University getting her second Bachelor's degree in Business Administration. She worked as a lecturer at Istanbul Gedik University's Occupational Health and Safety Program and Istanbul Kavram Vocational High School's Management of Health Institutions Program. Since the start of 2017-2018 academic period, she is working as a lecturer at Uskudar University's Health Information System Technics Program. She continues her Health Management PhD education at Sakarya University.
